output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez received a $25,000 security deposit in cash upon signing a 1-year lease with a tenant. Under IFRS, a security deposit received from a tenant represents a refundable liability, not revenue. The deposit will be held during the lease term and either returned to the tenant at lease end or applied against damages or unpaid rent. At the time of receipt, the transaction increases Cash (asset) and creates a corresponding liability (Security Deposits Payable). The monthly rent of $10,000 is not relevant to this specific transaction, which records only the deposit receipt. No tax is mentioned in the transaction text, so no tax treatment is applied.
